productDisplayName: Puma Men Future Cat White Casual Shoes
description: Designed for everyday wear, the puma cat range of puma everyday sneakers embodies excitement and energy for life. The Future cat M1 comes with synthetic overlays on the sides with a textured backfoot finish. The outsoles with horizontal grips make these shoes very comfortable and durable while providing excellent grip, making it perfect for urban wear.
